zsign upstream source
=====================

Repository: https://github.com/zhlynn/zsign
Vendored commit: 28a64217aa52d44a87a47dbc5e3bd59344c14a5d
Commit date: 2026-04-14 10:12:07 +0800
License: MIT, see LICENSE in this directory.

Included:
- src signing library sources used by EasySign.
- src/common helpers.
- src/third-party/minizip, excluding Windows-only iowin32 files.
- src/third-party/zlib.

Excluded:
- src/zsign.cpp, because EasySign embeds zsign as an in-process backend instead of building the CLI main.
- certcheck and metadata CLI helpers, because the app signing flow does not use them.
- upstream build scripts and prebuilt third-party binaries.
